Course closed for this cycle: Polar Studies (Scott Polar Research Institute) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
Sep. 3, 2025
Application deadline
Mar. 26, 2026
These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Polar Studies (Scott Polar Research Institute) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The aims of the course are to provide an understanding of key contemporary research problems in a range of disciplines in the humanities, social sciences and natural sciences relating to the Arctic and Antarctica, and to allow students to undertake original research on a topic selected in consultation with members of staff.
